author: y4rr
content:
Result: Removed cascade_skip from create_feature_extractor_smoke (#880 guard). Added 8 integration tests for FeatureExtractor in conformance_vision_models.rs:
- create_feature_extractor_smoke: real integration test wrapping UNet, requesting enc1+head
- feature_extractor_unet_enc1_shape: enc1 -> [1,64,32,32]
- feature_extractor_unet_bottleneck_shape: bottleneck -> [1,1024,2,2]
- feature_extractor_unet_all_nodes_present: all feature_node_names() keys appear in forward_features()
- feature_extractor_yolo_stage5_shape: stage5 -> [1,512,13,13] for 416x416 input
- feature_extractor_yolo_output_matches_module_forward: head intermediate == Module::forward
- feature_extractor_rejects_invalid_unet_node: construction fails for 'bogus_encoder'
- feature_extractor_rejects_invalid_yolo_node: construction fails for 'layer3'
Base models: UNet + YOLO (both implement IntermediateFeatures, no dependency on B.5.a ResNet fix).
Extended regenerate_vision_fixtures.py with feature_extractor_unet_node_shapes, _yolo_stage5_shape, _head_matches_module_forward fixtures.
45/45 conformance tests pass, clippy -D warnings clean.
